title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a MODEL CAR BRAND
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MODEL CAR BRAND" "Hot Wheels" with the following data
  | key  | value      |
  | name | Hot Wheels |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key          | value      |
  | name         | Hot Wheels |
  | founded      |            |
  | defunct      |            |
  | country_code |            |
